title: stylidium ciliatum
intro: Stylidium ciliatum, commonly known as the hairy triggerplant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae, native to Western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The leaves and flowers of the stylidium ciliatum are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, offering various health benefits including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of stylidium ciliatum can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments to utilize its medicinal properties.
